plan.failureSummary: The automation failed because it attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is not present in the current UI. Visual evidence shows the form currently contains a 'Your Name' field instead.
observedIndicators: failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field instead of 'Last Name' field
'Set 2' badge visible in screenshot suggests dynamic UI variations
usedDeterministicMode is true, indicating a stale cache is being applied to a changed UI

remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive. This will force page.ai to re-examine the current page state rather than relying on stale cached selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Assess form stability and adjust deterministic mode usage.
remediationSteps.details: If the application intentionally rotates form fields (A/B testing or sets), ensure the test remains in a mode that can adapt to these changes, or increase the frequency of cache refreshes.

plan.notes: The application appears to serve dynamic form 'Sets' (the failure screenshot shows 'Set 2'). Because the test was running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it used cached selectors for a different version of the form (likely 'Set 1'). The overall objective 'Fill out the all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible enough to succeed if the cache is cleared.
